title: attendance — subprocessors
description: The Attendance module engages ZERO third-party subprocessors — every state transition is first-party. Downstream: notifications (dispatch), finance::invoice (no-show fees), storage (signature images on S3), membership (freeze cascade). All internal to Academorix.

downstream_subprocessors_referenced.used_for: Dispatching attendance lifecycle notifications (email, SMS for freeze cascade, in-app).
No-show fee invoicing via CreateNoShowFeeInvoiceAction. Downstream Stripe/Paddle subprocessors managed at the payment module boundary.
S3 signed URLs for signature_url_signed + documented_url_signed (medical notes on absence records). No third-party CDN in the hot path.
GPS validation for checked_in_via='geofence'. No third-party geocoding — self-hosted PostGIS distance queries.

notes: GDPR Art. 30 requires this record even when empty.
Device fingerprint + IP + GPS are collected first-party for fraud correlation. NO third-party fraud vendor (Sift, Iovation, etc.) receives this data — deliberately kept in-tenant.
